page: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an LSv3-family virtual machine configured with 48 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server features 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, providing 2.0 threads per core. The processor includes 48 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI for accelerated vector calculations.

A defining characteristic of the L48s_v3 is its massive local storage capacity, offering 12012 GB of local storage alongside Premium Storage compatibility. The system memory configuration provides 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core, totaling 384.0 GB. This high-density resource allocation is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without resource sharing.

In benchmark evaluations, the L48s_v3 demonstrates strong performance in memory and cryptographic operations. The Passmark CPU score of 48928.12 and Passmark memory score of 2908.37 both rank in the top 25% tier. Cryptographic capabilities are highlighted by a Passmark CPU encryption test score of 43900.85. For specialized workloads, the server achieves a strong image processing score of 15139.0 on Geekbench and an LLM text generation speed of 282.26 tokens per second using a small 135M model. Other metrics, such as Redis SET operations at 45.6 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 40.77 GB/sec, fall within the average range.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the L48s_v3 offers a high density of local storage and memory relative to its compute footprint, making it a viable alternative to dedicated bare-metal hardware for storage-heavy applications. The absence of a GPU limits its utility for heavy deep learning training, but its strong memory bandwidth and massive local NVMe capacity make it highly suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, transactional processing, and high-throughput analytical workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an LSv3-family virtual machine designed for storage-intensive and memory-heavy workloads. It features 48 vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz, paired with 384.0 GB of RAM and a substantial 12012 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 server delivers strong performance in cryptographic and memory operations, as evidenced by a Passmark CPU score of 48928.12 and a memory score of 2908.37. The hardware profile lacks a dedicated GPU but excels in data-dense tasks. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, transactional applications, and data warehousing where massive local storage and high memory capacity are critical.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an LSv3-family virtual machine featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12012 GB of local storage, optimized for high-throughput database and storage-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is a storage-optimized VM featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12012 GB local storage for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized virtual machine designed for demanding database workloads and large-scale data processing.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz
384.0 GB of system memory with 8.0 GB per core
12012 GB of high-capacity local storage with Premium Storage support
Strong performance in Passmark CPU and memory benchmarks
Optimized for large-scale databases, transactional systems, and data warehousing
